description: COMPANION TO PASS 3. A direct read of SLS(30) mapping design intent vs implemented reality, six gaps ordered by leverage with strategic bridges. G1 SINGLE-SPLIT (root of the overfit: every optimizer selects best-fit on one 70/30 split, overfit-check fires AFTER selection -- all 9 regimes failed identically because they share this one mechanism; 562500 combos vs 1 split = luckiest noise combo shows +0.188R fake edge). G2 MARGINALS (system measures single-voice IC only; pairwise interaction ~absent, lagged/transition edge ZERO occurrences -- confirmed by grep; this is the biggest intent-vs-reality gap and exactly what Manuel asked to close). G3 POWER (W#9 n<500 floor present in SLS30 but PENDING_BACKTEST; session weights still admit at sHoldout<10). G4 PARITY (never verified). G5 NULL-GHOST (arbiter never audited). G6 VESTIGIAL sub-phases inherit G1+G3 flaws on the thinnest cells. Repair order: G1+G3 are load-bearing, G2 only safe once they hold, G4+G5 gate the verdict. Use this to sequence the Pass 3 warrants already dispatched.
